channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senegal passes law increasing penalties for same-sex relations and promotion of LGBT activities
item.description: Lawmakers in Senegal have approved a new bill that significantly increases penalties for same-sex sexual activities and criminalises efforts to promote homosexuality. The vote passed overwhelmingly wi...

item.title: UK releases Mandelson documents amid strained relations with Trump administration over Epstein links
item.description: The UK government has released documents detailing the vetting, appointment, and eventual departure of Peter Mandelson as British ambassador to the United States, following pressure from MPs. This dis...

item.title: Daily Horoscope Guidance for March 12, 2026
item.description: This horoscope for March 12, 2026, provides astrological guidance for each zodiac sign, offering insight into personal, professional, and financial matters. Those with birthdays today are encouraged t...

item.title: China Strengthens Partnership with Tanzania to Boost Industrial and Manufacturing Sector
item.description: China has confirmed its commitment to support Tanzania in growing its industrial sector, with special focus on manufacturing, technology transfer, and skills development. The Chinese ambassador, Ms Ch...

item.title: Sharp Fuel Price Hike Raises Transport and Food Costs During Ramazan
item.description: The recent Rs55 per litre surge in fuel prices has triggered widespread economic stress across Pakistan, especially during the holy month of Ramazan. Households are facing higher transportation costs ...

item.title: Government to Proceed with Appeals on Offshore Oil and Gas Environmental Authorisations
item.description: The South African government, under Minister Willie Aucamp of the Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment, is moving forward with the review of appeals related to environmental authorisa...

item.title: Congressional Powers and Oversight in Response to Military Action in Iran
item.description: Despite President Trump's large-scale military assault on Iran, the reasons provided for entering the conflict have been inconsistent, ranging from regime change and the destruction of nuclear weapons...

item.title: Five people die in separate road accidents in Cebu
item.description: CEBU CITY, Philippines — Tragic road accidents struck Cebu on Tuesday, resulting in five fatalities and several injuries. The first incident happened in Barangay Busay when a wing van overshot the hig...

item.title: Pakistan Votes for Both Bahrain and Russia Resolutions at UN, Calls for Immediate Dialogue to Prevent Further Escalation
item.description: Pakistan has explained its stance at the United Nations Security Council regarding two competing draft resolutions aimed at easing the Middle East tensions. On 11th March, the Council passed a Bahrain...

item.title: Baobab Nigeria Launches Training Program to Improve Solar Energy Advice for Households and SMEs in Lagos
item.description: Baobab Microfinance Bank Nigeria don start one new project wey dem call the Green Finance Project. The main aim na to train people wey go fit sabi advise households and small businesses for Lagos abou...

item.title: Meta Removes 10.9 Million Scam-Linked Accounts in 2025 and Introduces New Anti-Fraud Features
item.description: Meta announced on March 11, 2026, significant steps to combat large-scale online scamming operations. In 2025, the company removed 10.9 million Facebook and Instagram accounts associated with criminal...

item.title: US Relocates KC-135 Aerial Refueling Tankers from Prince Sultan Air Base Amid Iranian Attacks
item.description: The United States has begun relocating its Boeing KC-135 Stratotanker aerial refueling aircraft from Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, marking a tactical adjustment to its military presence in t...

item.title: Iran's leadership shifts toward nuclear weapons amid escalating tensions
item.description: Iranian leaders, historically divided on pursuing nuclear weapons, have now reached a consensus in favor of developing them following recent aggressive actions by Israel and the United States. Diploma...

item.title: Kristi Noem Loses Complimentary Mar-a-Lago Membership After Removal as Homeland Security Secretary
item.description: Former South Dakota Governor and ex-Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has reportedly lost her complimentary membership at Donald Trump's exclusive Mar-a-Lago club in Palm Beach, Fl...

item.title: Iran confirms withdrawal from FIFA World Cup 2026 over safety concerns
item.description: Iran has announced it will not participate in the FIFA World Cup 2026, scheduled for June across the United States, Mexico, and Canada. The country's sports minister, Ahmad Donyamali, cited safety con...

item.title: Tinubu Urges Political Parties to Respect Electoral Act and Settle Differences at the Polls
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu don yan say no be time to dey change the new Electoral Act again. During one interfaith dinner for State House, Abuja, e tell leaders from APC and IPAC say democracy dey re...

item.title: Jennifer Lopez Reveals She Took a Year Off Work to Process Her Divorce from Ben Affleck and Focus on Family
item.description: In a candid interview previewed on Good Morning America and set for Nightline, Jennifer Lopez opened up about the personal toll of her 2024 divorce from Ben Affleck. The 56-year-old entertainer descri...

item.title: Canadian Cancer Society Recommends Starting Colorectal Cancer Screening at Age 45
item.description: The Canadian Cancer Society is advocating for provinces and territories to lower the starting age for colorectal cancer screening from 50 to 45 due to increasing rates among younger adults. They recom...

item.title: Understanding Kenya's Electricity Supply Challenges and Solutions
item.description: Since late 2024, Kenya has been facing persistent electricity shortages, forcing households and businesses to deal with regular power cuts. President William Ruto confirmed that daily load-shedding fr...

item.title: Simba aims to close gap with Yanga in Premier League clash against Singida
item.description: Today, football fans in Tanzania will be closely watching the Mainland Tanzania Premier League match between Simba SC and Singida Black Stars at Airtel Stadium. The game is scheduled to kick off at 4p...
